summary: Comprehensive testing of CrewZ e-commerce website completed. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with proper functionality. Full shopping flow (add to cart -> checkout -> order tracking) works end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: SMTP email is built but not configured (logs warning instead of sending) - expected per requirements
Product images use placeholder stock photos - noted in UI with disclaimer text
Testimonials are placeholder - noted in UI with disclaimer text
test_credentials: No credentials needed for guest checkout. Admin uses Emergent Google OAuth.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing with TEST_ prefix in customer names
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality tested and working. Backend APIs: products, newsletter, contact, orders, order tracking all pass. Frontend: Homepage, 3 product pages, shop, cart, checkout, order tracking, support, technology, compare, founders, app, admin login, returns policy, privacy policy all load correctly. Full e-commerce flow tested: add to cart -> cart page -> checkout -> order confirmation -> order tracking. Currency conversion (USD/GBP/AUD) works. Newsletter subscription works. Contact form works. Admin page shows Google OAuth login button when unauthenticated.

backend_apis.GET /api/products: PASS - Returns 3 products with correct pricing ($200 Speed, $250 Cox, $300 Coach)
backend_apis.POST /api/newsletter: PASS - Subscribes email, handles duplicates gracefully
backend_apis.POST /api/contact: PASS - Submits contact message, validates required fields
backend_apis.POST /api/orders: PASS - Creates order, calculates totals, handles currency conversion
backend_apis.GET /api/orders/track/{order_number}: PASS - Returns order details with status timeline
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/*: PASS - All admin endpoints return 401 when unauthenticated

frontend_pages.Homepage: PASS - Hero, products, differentiators, comparison, email capture sections
frontend_pages.Product Pages (/products/speed, /cox, /c: PASS - Product data, features, specs, FAQ accordion
frontend_pages.Shop Page: PASS - All 3 products, currency selector, add to cart buttons
frontend_pages.Cart Page: PASS - Items display, quantity controls, currency selector, checkout button
frontend_pages.Checkout Page: PASS - Form validation, order summary, pre-order submission
frontend_pages.Order Tracking Page: PASS - Search form, order status timeline, items display
frontend_pages.Compare Page: PASS - Product comparison table, vs traditional table
frontend_pages.Support Page: PASS - FAQ accordion, contact form submission
frontend_pages.Admin Page: PASS - Shows Google OAuth login button when unauthenticated

navigation.Header: PASS - Logo, products dropdown, all nav links, shop button, cart button

e2e_flows.Shopping Flow: PASS - Add to cart -> Cart -> Checkout -> Order confirmation -> Track order
e2e_flows.Newsletter Subscription: PASS - Email submission shows success message
e2e_flows.Contact Form: PASS - Form submission shows success message
